boundary_binding.action_boundary: May quality release the clinical batch?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No exact match on assay-acceptance status
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Release date met but acceptance pending

final_answer: Source records indicate that while deviation closure CLOSE-FJO-086 addresses the batch, assay, criterion, and date, the critical assay-acceptance status remains pending. Policy STD-FJO-086-P mandates a full match, including acceptance, before release. Therefore, the source boundary remains open, and the action may not proceed.
